name: Disable System Beep
description: Disables the hardware system beep driver (Beep.sys).

name: Disable Spatial Audio
description: Disables spatial audio for low-latency devices.

name: Disable System Sounds
description: Clears the default sound events for common system sounds.

name: Show Disconnected Audio Devices
description: Shows disconnected audio devices in the sound control panel.

name: Show Hidden Audio Devices
description: Shows hidden audio devices in the sound control panel.

name: Clear Wallpaper History
description: Clears the personalization wallpaper history registry entries and cached background files.

name: Cleanup Component Store
description: Cleans up the Windows component store (WinSxS folder) to free up disk space. This is a safe operation that removes superseded components and reduces the size of the component store.

name: Clear Delivery Optimization Files
description: Deletes Delivery Optimization cache used for Windows Update P2P sharing. The DoSvc service will be stopped.

name: Clear DirectX Shader Cache
description: Clears DirectX and vendor shader caches (NVIDIA, AMD, Intel). Shaders will be recompiled on next app launch.

name: Disable Reserved Storage
description: Disables Windows Reserved Storage, which reserves about 7GB of disk space for Windows updates and temporary files. Only recommended if you have limited disk space and understand the implications.

name: Clear {logName} Event Log
description: Clears the Windows {logName} event log. WARNING: Logs cannot be recovered after clearing.

name: Clear Font Cache
description: Clears the Windows font cache. Use this if fonts are not rendering properly. The FontCache service will be stopped and restarted.

name: Clear Temporary Internet Files
description: Clears legacy WinINet cache (INetCache, INetCookies, WebCache, History). Used by Explorer, old Control Panel, and some installers.

name: Clear Memory Dump Files
description: Deletes BSoD memory dump files (MEMORY.DMP). These can be several GB in size.

name: Clear Prefetch Files
description: Clears Windows prefetch files used for application launch optimization. Files will be regenerated over time.

name: Remove Product Key from Registry
description: Removes the Windows product key from the registry to prevent theft by malicious code. The key can be reactivated if needed.

name: Empty Recycle Bin
description: Empties the Recycle Bin for all drives. Files cannot be recovered after deletion.

name: Clear Shadow Copies
description: Removes all shadow copies (volume backups) to free up disk space. WARNING: This permanently removes System Restore points and volume snapshots.

name: Clear SRUM Database
description: Deletes the System Resource Usage Monitor (SRUM) database which tracks app, service, and network usage.

name: Clear Temporary Files
description: Deletes temporary files from user and system temp folders. Files in use will be skipped.

name: Clear Thumbnail Cache
description: Clears Explorer thumbnail cache files. Thumbnails will be regenerated when needed.

name: Clear Windows Error Reporting Files
description: Deletes Windows Error Reporting (WER) crash dumps and report metadata from system and user folders.

name: Delete Windows.old Folder
description: Removes previous Windows installation files from Windows.old. WARNING: You will not be able to roll back to the previous Windows version after deletion.

name: Clear Windows Update Cache
description: Resets Windows Update cache (SoftwareDistribution and catroot2). Use this to fix update loops. Update catalog metadata will be redownloaded.

name: Disable .NET SDK Telemetry
description: Stops .NET SDK from sending usage data to Microsoft. Source: Microsoft .NET SDK Documentation

name: Enable Windows Long Paths
description: Enables the Windows long-path prerequisite for compatible applications, including development tools that work with deep directory trees. Source: Microsoft Windows Developer Documentation

name: Optimize Node.js Performance
description: Increases Node.js memory limit and enables performance optimizations for large JavaScript projects.

name: Allow Local PowerShell Scripts
description: Sets PowerShell execution policy to RemoteSigned, allowing local scripts to run while requiring signatures for remote scripts. Source: Microsoft PowerShell Documentation

name: Fix Python Path Length Issues
description: Ensures Python can handle long paths on Windows, preventing import errors in deep directory structures.

name: Enable SSH Agent Auto-start
description: Automatically starts SSH agent on login for seamless Git SSH key authentication.

name: Enable Windows Terminal Developer Features
description: Enables advanced features in Windows Terminal like debug tap and developer mode settings.

name: Optimize VS IntelliSense Cache
description: Increases Visual Studio IntelliSense cache size for better code completion performance in large projects.

name: Speed Up Visual Studio Solution Load
description: Disables background solution load analysis for faster Visual Studio startup on large solutions.

name: Disable VS Code Git Autofetch
description: Disables automatic Git fetching in VS Code to reduce network usage and CPU spikes.

name: Enable Windows Developer Mode
description: Enables Windows Developer Mode for sideloading apps and accessing advanced development features. Source: Microsoft Windows Developer Documentation

name: Disable Low Disk Space Warning
description: Turns off the low disk space warning notification.

name: Hide Taskbar Chat Icon
description: Hides the Microsoft Teams Chat icon from the taskbar by default.

name: Enable Compact View
description: Reduces the spacing between items in File Explorer for a more information-dense view.

name: Show File Extensions
description: Shows the file extension (e.g., .txt, .exe) for all known file types in File Explorer.

name: Show Full Path in Title Bar
description: Displays the complete directory path in the title bar of File Explorer windows.

name: Show Hidden Files and Folders
description: Configures File Explorer to show files and folders marked with the hidden attribute.

name: Align Taskbar to Left
description: Moves the Taskbar icons and Start button to the traditional left alignment (Windows 11).

name: Disable Microsoft Edge Features
description: Disables telemetry, personalization, sync, sidebar, shopping, rewards, and various other Edge features. Also disables Windows 8/8.1 EdgeUI features.

name: Disable Microsoft Office Telemetry
description: Disables Office telemetry logging, data collection, CEIP opt-in, feedback collection, and telemetry agent tasks for all Office applications.

name: Disable OneDrive
description: Completely disables OneDrive sync, hides it from File Explorer, and prevents network traffic before user sign-in.

name: Disable Visual Studio Telemetry
description: Disables Visual Studio telemetry, SQM data collection, IntelliCode remote analysis, and feedback features for VS 2015-2022.

name: Optimize 7-Zip Context Menu Settings
description: Configures 7-Zip with optimal settings: cascaded menu, eliminate duplicate extraction folders, show icons in context menu, and propagate Zone.Id stream for Office files.

name: Disable Active Probing
description: Turns off NCSI active probing for internet connectivity tests.

name: Disable Default Shares
description: Disables automatic administrative shares on the SMB server.

name: Disable IPv6
description: Disables IPv6 protocol system-wide. May cause issues with some modern network apps.

name: Disable LLMNR
description: Turns off multicast name resolution (LLMNR).

name: Set LLTD Policies to Default Behavior
description: Disables the explicit LLTD mapper and responder policies so Windows uses the documented default behavior.

name: Set mDNS Policy to Local Settings
description: Disables the explicit mDNS policy so Windows falls back to locally configured mDNS behavior.

name: Disable NetBIOS over TCP/IP
description: Disables NetBIOS over TCP/IP on all IP-enabled adapters using the documented per-interface Windows control surface.

name: Disable NetBIOS Name Resolution
description: Disables NetBIOS name resolution on the DNS client.

name: Disable Plaintext SMB Passwords
description: Prevents sending unencrypted passwords to SMB servers.

name: Disable Smart Multi-Homed Name Resolution
description: Disables smart name resolution across multiple network interfaces.

name: Disable SMBv1
description: Disables the legacy SMBv1 protocol on the server.

name: Disable SMBv2/SMBv3
description: Disables the SMBv2/SMBv3 protocol on the server.

name: Disable Wi-Fi Sense
description: Prevents Windows from automatically connecting to suggested open hotspots.

name: Enable LLTD Responder
description: Enables the Link-Layer Topology Discovery Responder driver for discovery by other PCs.

name: Enable LLTD Mapper I/O
description: Enables the Link-Layer Topology Discovery Mapper I/O driver for network mapping.

name: Flush DNS Cache
description: Clears the DNS resolver cache. Useful for resolving DNS issues or ensuring fresh DNS lookups. This is a one-time operation and cannot be rolled back.

name: Optimize SMB Performance
description: Enables SMB multichannel and optimizes cache lifetimes for network file sharing.

name: Prefer IPv4 over IPv6
description: Configures the IPv6 stack to prefer IPv4 without fully disabling IPv6.

name: Require NTLM SSP Client Session Security and 128-bit Encryption
description: Requires NTLMv2 session security and 128-bit encryption for NTLM SSP based clients.

name: Reset Winsock Catalog
description: Resets the Winsock catalog to default settings. Useful for fixing network connectivity issues. Requires system restart to take effect.

name: SMB: Disable Leasing
description: Disables SMB server leasing using the documented SMB server configuration surface.

name: SMB: Enable Large MTU
description: Enables large MTU support for SMB client connections.

name: SMB: Enable Multichannel
description: Enables SMB Multichannel on the documented SMB client and SMB server configuration surfaces.

name: SMB: Enable QUIC
description: Enables SMB over QUIC for client and server.

name: SMB: Require Encryption
description: Requires SMB server encryption for shared data.

name: SMB: Reject Unencrypted Access
description: Rejects SMB clients that do not support encryption.

name: SMB: Require Dialect 3.1.1
description: Restricts SMB client/server dialects to exactly SMB 3.1.1.

name: SMB: Require Client Signing
description: Requires SMB client signing for outbound connections.

name: SMB: Require Signing (Server)
description: Requires SMB server signing for inbound connections.

name: SMB: Set Cipher Suite Order
description: Sets the SMB encryption cipher suite order to AES-256 variants.

name: Disable Feedback Requests
description: Stops Windows from asking for feedback or ratings.

name: Disable Lock Screen Notifications
description: Prevents app notifications from showing on the lock screen.

name: Disable Notification Mirroring
description: Stops notifications from being mirrored to other devices.

name: Disable Tile Notifications
description: Prevents apps from updating tiles and tile badges.

name: Disable Toast Notifications
description: Blocks balloon and toast notifications for all applications for the current user.

name: Disable Window Animations
description: Disables window animations to make the UI feel snappier. Reference: Microsoft PC Performance Guidelines

name: Remove Menu Show Delay
description: Removes the artificial delay when showing menus for a more responsive feel.

name: Disable Taskbar Animations
description: Disables taskbar animations for a slight performance boost.

name: Disable Audio Ducking
description: Disables Windows automatic volume adjustment when making calls or using communication apps. Equivalent to 'Do nothing' in Sound settings.

name: Disable Audio Enhancements
description: Disables audio enhancements and exclusive mode for audio devices. Provides cleaner audio output without processing.

name: AutoPlay: Take No Action
description: Sets AutoPlay handlers to take no action for common media events.

name: Disable AutoPlay
description: Disables AutoPlay on all drives and blocks AutoPlay for non-volume devices for the current user.

name: Disable Sticky Keys Prompt
description: Prevents the annoying prompt when pressing Shift multiple times.

name: Disable Language Switch Hotkey
description: Disables Ctrl+Shift and Alt+Shift language switching hotkeys to prevent accidental language changes during gaming or typing.

name: Optimize Keyboard Repeat Rate
description: Sets keyboard to minimum repeat delay and maximum repeat rate for faster typing. Also slows cursor blink rate to 900ms.

name: Disable Enhanced Pointer Precision (Mouse Acceleration)
description: Disables mouse acceleration for 1:1 mouse movement. Preferred by gamers and precision users.

name: Disable Mouse Throttling for Background Windows
description: Disables raw mouse input throttling for background windows, improving mouse responsiveness. Useful for monitoring tools like MouseTester.

name: Disable CPU Idle States (C-States)
description: Disables CPU idle states and C-States for minimum latency. Increases power consumption but improves responsiveness. Recommended for gaming/audio production.

name: Disable CPU Core Parking
description: Prevents Windows from parking CPU cores, keeping all cores active. Reduces latency and improves responsiveness for gaming and real-time applications.

name: Disable Fast Startup (Hiberboot)
description: Disables Fast Startup feature which uses hibernation for faster boot times. Fixes some driver and dual-boot issues.

name: Disable Hibernation
description: Disables hibernation and deletes hiberfil.sys to save disk space. This prevents the system from entering hibernation mode but does not affect sleep mode.

name: Disable Modern Standby
description: Disables Modern Standby (S0 Low Power Idle) and switches to traditional S3 sleep mode. Improves desktop power behavior.

name: Disable Network Adapter Power Saving
description: Disables network throttling and optimizes multimedia/network responsiveness. Improves gaming and streaming performance.

name: Disable Power Throttling
description: Disables Windows Power Throttling which limits background process performance. Improves overall system responsiveness.

name: Disable Superfetch (SysMain)
description: Disables the Superfetch service (SysMain) which preloads frequently used applications. Can improve performance on SSDs where prefetching is not beneficial.

name: Disable Windows Search
description: Disables the Windows Search indexing service. This can improve system performance but will slow down file searches. Useful for systems with SSDs where search performance is already fast.

name: Hide Hibernate Power Option
description: Hides the Hibernate option from the power menu.

name: Hide Lock Power Option
description: Hides the Lock option from the power menu.

name: Hide Sleep Power Option
description: Hides the Sleep option from the power menu.

name: Optimize CPU Performance Boost
description: Sets PERFBOOSTMODE to Aggressive on the active power plan using the documented power setting surface.

name: Optimize Gaming Network Settings
description: Boosts priority for gaming tasks, improving network latency and frame timing. Sets high priority for GPU, scheduling, and I/O.

name: Optimize Power Settings for Performance
description: Applies multiple power optimizations: disables timer coalescing, deep IO coalescing, core parking latency, and energy estimation for maximum performance.

name: Block Microsoft Accounts
description: Prevents adding or signing in with Microsoft accounts.

name: Deny App Access (Except Microphone)
description: Forces Windows apps to be denied access to sensitive capabilities.

name: Disable Activity History
description: Stops publishing and uploading activity history (Timeline) across devices.

name: Disable Advertising ID
description: Prevents Windows from tracking you for advertising personalization.

name: Disable App Diagnostics
description: Prevents apps from accessing diagnostic information.

name: Disable App Launch Tracking
description: Stops Windows from tracking app launches for Start/Search personalization.

name: Disable App Suggestions in Start
description: Prevents Windows from suggesting promoted apps in the Start menu.

name: Disable Application Compatibility
description: Turns off Windows application compatibility components, telemetry, and related tasks.

name: Disable Application Telemetry
description: Stops the Application Telemetry engine from collecting usage data for compatibility.

name: Disable Background Apps
description: Prevents Windows apps from running in the background, saving battery and resources.

name: Disable Biometrics
description: Turns off Windows biometric features on this device.

name: Disable Biometrics for Domain Logon
description: Prevents domain users from signing in with biometrics.

name: Disable Biometrics Logon
description: Prevents users from signing in with biometrics.

name: Disable Camera Access (Policy)
description: Disables camera access for all applications via group policy.

name: Disable CEIP
description: Opts out of Customer Experience Improvement Program data collection.

name: Disable PowerShell & .NET CLI Telemetry
description: Opts out of PowerShell and .NET CLI telemetry for the current user.

name: Disable Consumer Account State Content
description: Prevents Windows experiences from using cloud consumer account content.

name: Disable Windows Copilot
description: Turns off the Windows Copilot AI experience for the current user.

name: Cross-Device Sharing
description: Choose whether nearby Windows experiences stay off, work only with your devices, or are available to everyone nearby.

name: Disable Device Name in Diagnostics
description: Prevents the device name from being included in diagnostic data.

name: Set Diagnostic Data to Minimum Supported Level
description: Sets diagnostic data collection to the lowest documented level supported by the edition.

name: Disable Diagnostic Data Deletion
description: Disables the ability to delete diagnostic data in Settings.

name: Disable Diagnostic Data Viewer
description: Blocks access to the Diagnostic Data Viewer in Settings.

name: Disable Edge Search Suggestions
description: Turns off search suggestions in Microsoft Edge address bar.

name: Disable F1 Help
description: Disables F1 help by renaming HelpPane.exe.

name: Disable Feedback Notifications
description: Stops Windows Feedback prompts from appearing.

name: Disable File History
description: Turns off File History backups.

name: Disable Find My Device
description: Stops Windows from registering this PC with Find My Device and keeps location-based recovery turned off.

name: Disable Font Providers
description: Prevents Windows from downloading fonts from online providers.

name: Disable Inking & Typing Personalization
description: Stops sending inking and typing data to Microsoft.

name: Disable KMS Activation Telemetry
description: Stops KMS client activation data from being sent to Microsoft.

name: Disable Website Access to Language List
description: Prevents websites from accessing the language list for content customization.

name: Disable Local Security Questions
description: Prevents setting security questions for local accounts.

name: Disable Location Consent (User)
description: Denies location capability access for the current user.

name: Disable Location Consent (System)
description: Denies location capability access at the system level.

name: Disable Location Scripting
description: Disables location scripting support for apps and scripts.

name: Disable Location Services
description: Turns off location tracking services system-wide for all users.

name: Disable MDM Enrollment
description: Prevents new MDM enrollments for this device.

name: Disable Message Sync
description: Stops SMS/MMS cloud sync for this device.

name: Disable Offline Files
description: Disables Offline Files (CSC) via policy, services, tasks, and Sync Center.

name: Disable OneSettings Downloads
description: Stops Windows from downloading configuration settings from OneSettings.

name: Disable Online Tips
description: Stops Settings from retrieving online tips and help content.

name: Disable Phone Linking
description: Prevents the device from participating in Phone-PC linking.

name: Disable Windows Recall
description: Disables saving snapshots for the Recall AI feature on this user.

name: Disable Resume Experiences
description: Turns off Resume (start on one device, continue on this PC).

name: Disable RSoP Logging
description: Turns off Resultant Set of Policy logging on this device.

name: Disable Search Box Suggestions
description: Stops File Explorer from showing recent search suggestions.

name: Disable Search History
description: Prevents search history from being stored for this user.

name: Disable Sensors
description: Turns off hardware sensor access for apps and system features.

name: Disable Sleep Study Diagnostics
description: Disables sleep study diagnostic event channels.

name: Disable Steps Recorder
description: Disables Steps Recorder through policy to prevent recording user actions.

name: Disable Suggestions & Tips
description: Turns off Windows tips, welcome experiences, and Settings recommendations.

name: Disable Content Delivery Manager Suggestions
description: Disables various suggestions and auto-installed apps from the Content Delivery Manager.

name: Turn Off Settings Sync by Default
description: Turns off syncing Windows settings and related data across devices while still allowing user override.

name: Disable Diagnostic Data Change Notifications
description: Stops opt-in change notifications for diagnostic data.

name: Disable Diagnostic Data Opt-in UI
description: Disables the diagnostic data opt-in settings UI in Settings.

name: Disable Windows Error Reporting
description: Disables automatic generation and upload of error reports to Microsoft.

name: Disable Windows Location Provider
description: Disables the Windows Location Provider for all apps.

name: Turn Off Windows Tips
description: Turns off Windows tips through the documented CloudContent machine policy.

name: Disable Windows Media Player Telemetry
description: Turns off usage tracking and online metadata for Windows Media Player.

name: Hide Last Logged-In User
description: Removes the last signed-in username from the sign-in screen.

name: Hide Start Personalized Site Recommendations (Policy)
description: Removes personalized website recommendations from Start for all users.

name: Hide Start Personalized Site Recommendations (User)
description: Removes personalized website recommendations from Start for the current user.

name: Hide Start Recommended Section (Policy)
description: Removes the Recommended section from the Start menu for all users.

name: Hide Start Recommended Section (User)
description: Removes the Recommended section from the Start menu for the current user.

name: Hide Username at Sign-In
description: Hides the username after credentials are entered at sign-in.

name: Limit Diagnostic Log Collection
description: Prevents additional diagnostic logs from being collected.

name: Limit Dump Collection
description: Limits diagnostic dumps to reduce the data sent in diagnostics.

name: Troubleshooter: Don't Run Any
description: Prevents recommended troubleshooters from running automatically.

name: Disable Downloads Blocking
description: Prevents Windows from marking downloads with zone information (MOTW).

name: Disable NTFS Encryption (EFS)
description: Prevents EFS encryption on NTFS volumes to avoid accidental data lockouts.

name: Disable P2P Updates
description: Disables Delivery Optimization peer-to-peer caching for updates.

name: Disable Password Reveal Button
description: Hides the 'eye' icon button that reveals passwords in credential prompts.

name: Disable Picture Password Sign-In
description: Prevents domain users from using picture passwords for sign-in.

name: Disable Remote Assistance
description: Disables solicited Remote Assistance connections to reduce attack surface.

name: Disable System Mitigations
description: Imports the documented Exploit Protection XML baseline that disables the researched system-wide mitigation bundle.

name: Disable System Restore
description: Disables System Restore through the official machine policy surface.

name: Disable UAC (Full)
description: Disables User Account Control entirely. Requires a reboot and severely lowers system security.

name: Disable VBS (HVCI)
description: Turns off virtualization-based security and memory integrity policies for lower latency.

name: Disable Windows Firewall
description: Turns off Windows Defender Firewall for the documented Domain and Standard firewall policy profiles. Reference: Microsoft Defender Firewall Docs

name: Disable Windows Update
description: Pauses updates and sets Windows Update policies to block access effectively till 2030.

name: Disable WPBT Execution
description: Blocks Windows Platform Binary Table (WPBT) programs from running at startup (prevents BIOS-injected bloatware).

name: Disable WU Driver Updates
description: Stops Windows Update from offering driver updates and device metadata to prevent problematic driver overwrites.

name: Enable Dynamic Lock
description: Automatically locks the device when the paired Bluetooth device is away.

name: Enable Windows Sudo
description: Enables the sudo for Windows feature with in-place elevation behavior.

name: Set PowerShell Policy to Unrestricted
description: Allows all PowerShell scripts to run without signing requirements. Very risky for general use.

name: Require Trusted Path for Credentials
description: Forces credential prompts to use the Secure Desktop to prevent interception.

name: Set UAC to Never Notify
description: Lowers User Account Control prompts to the least restrictive setting. Risky for security but reduces interruptions. Reference: Microsoft Security Baselines

name: Check Disk Health (C:)
description: Performs a read-only check of the C: drive for file system errors without making any changes. Provides information about disk health and potential issues.

name: Disable Aero Shake
description: Prevents windows from being minimized or restored when the active window is shaken back and forth with the mouse.

name: Disable Auto Reboot on Crash
description: Prevents automatic reboot after a crash to allow reading the BSOD.

name: Show BSOD Parameters
description: Displays additional crash parameters on the blue screen.

name: Disable Automatic App Archiving
description: Stops Windows from archiving unused apps automatically.

name: Disable Automatic Maintenance
description: Stops scheduled automatic maintenance tasks from running.

name: Disable Background Group Policy Updates
description: Prevents Group Policy from refreshing while users are active.

name: Disable Clipboard History & Sync
description: Turns off clipboard history and cross-device clipboard synchronization.

name: Disable Clipboard Redirection (RDP)
description: Prevents clipboard sharing between remote desktop sessions and the local machine.

name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations
description: Disables fullscreen optimizations for more consistent exclusive fullscreen behavior.

name: Disable JPEG Reduction
description: Sets the desktop wallpaper JPEG import quality to 100% to avoid compression artifacts.

name: Disable Restartable Apps
description: Prevents apps from automatically restarting after sign-in.

name: Disable Telemetry & Maintenance Tasks
description: Disables dozens of scheduled tasks related to telemetry, data collection, and non-essential maintenance.

name: Disable Search Highlights (Policy)
description: Disables search highlights via policy for all users.

name: Disable Remote Search Queries
description: Prevents remote clients from querying this device's search index.

name: Disable Web Search Results
description: Removes web results from Windows Search for all users.

name: Disable Service Splitting
description: Prevents services from being split into separate svchost processes.

name: Remove Shortcut Arrow Overlay
description: Removes the small arrow icon that appears on desktop shortcuts.

name: Disable Startup Program Delay
description: Removes the artificial 10-second delay for startup programs to make boot feel faster.

name: Disable Storage Sense
description: Turns off Storage Sense automatic cleanup.

name: Disable Storage Sense Temporary Files Cleanup
description: Prevents Storage Sense from deleting temporary files.

name: Disable Store in Open With
description: Removes the \

name: DWM: Disable Multiplane Overlay (MPO)
description: Disables MPO to avoid flicker or driver issues on some systems.

name: DWM: Disable Overlay Minimum FPS
description: Removes the minimum FPS requirement for overlay assignment.

name: Enable Game Mode
description: Ensures Windows Game Mode is active for optimized resource allocation during gaming.

name: Enable Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling
description: Lets the GPU handle its own scheduling for improved responsiveness.

name: Enable Indexing of Encrypted Items
description: Allows encrypted files to be indexed by Windows Search.

name: Graphics: Disable Overlay Planes
description: Disables overlay planes to reduce composition issues in some configurations.

name: Graphics: Page Fault Debug Mode
description: Restores the graphics page-fault debug mode value Windows expects by default. Useful when undoing manual scheduler experiments.

name: Graphics: TDR DDI Delay (Default)
description: Sets the DDI timeout delay (TdrDdiDelay) to the documented default.

name: Graphics: TDR Delay (Default)
description: Sets the GPU timeout delay (TdrDelay) to the documented default.

name: Graphics: TDR Level (Default)
description: Sets the TDR recovery level to the documented default.

name: Graphics: TDR Limit Count (Default)
description: Sets the TDR limit count to the documented default.

name: Graphics: TDR Limit Time (Default)
description: Sets the TDR limit time to the documented default.

name: Kernel: Adjust DPC Threshold
description: Sets the DPC threshold adjustment value to the documented default.

name: Kernel: Cache-Aware Scheduling
description: Restores Windows' documented cache-aware scheduling default so the scheduler stays aligned with normal CPU cache topology behavior.

name: Kernel: Default Dynamic Hetero CPU Policy
description: Returns Windows' hybrid CPU scheduling policy to the documented default used for heterogeneous core systems.

name: Kernel: Disable Low QoS Timer Resolution
description: Disables low QoS timer resolution using the documented default value.

name: Kernel: DPC Queue Depth
description: Sets the maximum DPC queue depth to the documented default.

name: Kernel: DPC Watchdog Period
description: Sets the DPC watchdog timeout to the documented default (milliseconds).

name: Kernel: Ideal DPC Rate
description: Sets the target DPC rate per second to the documented default.

name: Kernel: Minimum DPC Rate
description: Sets the minimum DPC rate threshold to the documented default.

name: Kernel: Serialize Timer Expiration
description: Enables timer serialization using the documented default value.

name: Kernel: Threaded DPC Enable
description: Enables threaded DPCs using the documented default value.

name: Clear Page File at Shutdown
description: Clears the page file on shutdown for privacy (slower shutdown).

name: Disable Paging Executive
description: Keeps kernel and drivers in RAM (requires sufficient memory).

name: Memory: Use Client System Cache
description: Keeps memory behavior on the normal desktop/client default so Windows favors applications instead of file-server style caching.

name: Memory: Reset Non-Paged Pool Size
description: Returns kernel non-paged pool allocation to the Windows-managed dynamic default. This is mainly a rollback-to-default style setting.

name: Memory: Reset Paged Pool Size
description: Returns kernel paged pool allocation to the Windows-managed dynamic default. Use this when a manual pool tweak should be undone.

name: Memory: Reset Registry Quota
description: Restores registry quota to the documented default so the registry goes back to normal Windows sizing behavior.

name: Disable 8.3 Name Creation
description: Stops NTFS from creating 8.3 short file names on all volumes.

name: Disable Last Access Updates
description: Disables last access timestamp updates to reduce disk I/O.

name: Enable Win32 Long Paths
description: Allows Win32 long paths for applications that opt in.

name: Reset NTFS Memory Usage
description: Resets NTFS memory usage back to the Windows default.

name: Reset NTFS MFT Zone Reservation
description: Resets the MFT zone reservation back to the Windows default.

name: Set Foreground Scheduling Priority
description: Sets Win32PrioritySeparation to the Windows default (0x26) for balanced foreground boost.

name: Reduce Shutdown Timeouts
description: Shortens shutdown wait times for faster logoff and shutdown.

name: Disable Bluetooth Audio Gateway Service
description: Disables the Bluetooth Audio Gateway service.

name: Disable Bluetooth Support Service
description: Disables the main Bluetooth support service.

name: Disable Bluetooth User Service
description: Disables per-user Bluetooth services.

name: Disable Connected User Experiences Service
description: Disables the Connected User Experiences and Telemetry service (DiagTrack).

name: Disable Print Device Configuration Service
description: Disables the printer device configuration service.

name: Disable Print Notification Service
description: Disables the printer notification service.

name: Disable Print Scan Broker Service
description: Disables the print and scan broker service.

name: Disable Print Spooler Service
description: Disables the Print Spooler service.

name: Disable Print Workflow User Service
description: Disables per-user print workflow services.

name: Disable SysMain Service
description: Disables the SysMain (Superfetch) service.

name: Disable WAP Push Routing Service
description: Disables the WAP Push Message Routing service.

name: Disable Windows Error Reporting Service
description: Disables the Windows Error Reporting service.

name: Disable Windows Search Service
description: Disables the Windows Search indexing service.

name: Enable Verbose Status Messages
description: Shows detailed status messages during startup, shutdown, logon, and logoff.

name: Use Default Account Picture
description: Forces the default account picture for all users on this device.

name: Disable Acrylic Logon Background
description: Disables the acrylic blur on the logon background image.

name: Disable Common Control Animations
description: Turns off common control and window animations for the current user.

name: Disable First Sign-In Animation
description: Skips the first sign-in animation and Microsoft account opt-in prompt.

name: Disable Lock Screen
description: Skips the lock screen and goes directly to the sign-in screen.

name: Disable Lock Screen Camera
description: Prevents the lock screen camera from being invoked.

name: Prevent Changing Lock Screen
description: Prevents users from changing the lock screen image.

name: Disable Lock Screen Background Motion
description: Stops the subtle motion effect on the lock screen background.

name: Disable Lock Screen Slideshow
description: Prevents lock screen slideshows from running.

name: Disable Windows Spotlight on Action Center
description: Stops Windows Spotlight notifications in Action Center.

name: Disable Spotlight Collection on Desktop
description: Removes the Spotlight collection option for desktop backgrounds.

name: Disable Windows Spotlight Features
description: Turns off Windows Spotlight features for the current user.

name: Disable Windows Spotlight on Settings
description: Stops Windows Spotlight suggestions in Settings.

name: Disable Spotlight Third-Party Suggestions
description: Stops Windows Spotlight from suggesting third-party content.

name: Disable Windows Spotlight Welcome Experience
description: Disables the Windows Spotlight welcome experience.

name: Disable Windows Connect Now Wizards
description: Disables Windows Connect Now setup wizards for wireless and device setup.

name: Disable Widgets (Policy)
description: Disables the Widgets/News and Interests feature via policy.

name: Disable Window Animations
description: Disables window animations like minimize and restore.

name: Force Classic Control Panel View
description: Always open Control Panel in the icon view.

name: Hide Language Bar
description: Hides the language bar UI for the current user.

name: Hide Most Used Apps
description: Forces the Start menu Most used list to stay hidden.

name: Hide People Bar
description: Removes the People Bar from the taskbar.

name: Restore Classic Context Menu
description: Restores the Windows 10 style context menu on Windows 11.
